creator: darius@dons.net.au
text:
(In reply to Mathieu Arnold from comment #6)
I beg to differ :)

In any case I don't see how it couldn't be considered a POLA violation.

Clearly the implication of setting PACKAGES is you want packages in that directory - why else would you set it?

I know this is a long standing issue, I have encountered it before but I don't understand why it couldn't/shouldn't be fixed - if there is a good reason then that is fine but otherwise.. Why not fix this usability issue?
